evals.prompt: I expected to add a hello world print in main.js and a placeholder xpto.js. Check if my staged changes match that.
evals.expected_output: ALL EXPECTED banner — both files are staged as described.
expectations: Output shows the ALL EXPECTED success banner (╔══ CHANGE CONSISTENCY: ALL EXPECTED ══╗)
No missing changes table is shown
No extra changes table is shown
Output does NOT mention discrepancies found

evals.prompt: I was supposed to add main.js with a print statement and xpto.js as a placeholder. Check staged changes.
evals.expected_output: DISCREPANCIES FOUND banner with unexpected.js listed as an extra change.
expectations: Output shows DISCREPANCIES FOUND banner (╔══ CHANGE CONSISTENCY: DISCREPANCIES FOUND ══╗)
unexpected.js is listed in the Extra Changes table
Summary line is present and mentions extra change(s)
Missing Changes section says None detected

evals.prompt: I planned to add main.js with a hello world print, xpto.js placeholder, AND a config.json with app settings. Verify staged changes.
evals.expected_output: DISCREPANCIES FOUND with config.json listed as missing, unexpected.js listed as extra.
expectations: Output shows DISCREPANCIES FOUND banner
config.json is listed in the Missing Changes table
unexpected.js is listed in the Extra Changes table
Summary line mentions both missing and extra changes

evals.prompt: I only expected to add main.js with a console.log. Nothing else. Are my staged changes consistent?
evals.expected_output: DISCREPANCIES FOUND with xpto.js and unexpected.js listed as extra changes.
expectations: Output shows DISCREPANCIES FOUND banner
xpto.js is listed in the Extra Changes table
unexpected.js is listed in the Extra Changes table
Missing Changes section says None detected
Summary line mentions 2 extra change(s)

evals.prompt: No staged changes scenario — I haven't staged anything yet. Just run the consistency check.
evals.expected_output: Informs the user that no staged changes were found and instructs them to use git add.
expectations: Output informs user that no staged changes were found
Output does NOT show an ALL EXPECTED or DISCREPANCIES FOUND banner
Output suggests using git add to stage changes
